display.purpose: Page headings, section titles, count values.

headline.purpose: Modal titles, content editor section headings.

body.purpose: Content text, form labels, table cells.

label.purpose: Status badges, column headers, stat labels.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button. Used for submits, creates, saves.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; height: 32px; padding: 2.5px 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; background: #252525; color: #fafafa; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease, transform 150ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: rgba(37,37,37,0.8); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112,112,112,0.5); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Secondary action. Paired with primary or used solo for less emphasis.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; white-space: nowrap; height: 32px; padding: 2.5px 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #ebebeb; background: #ffffff; color: #252525; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms ease; outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: #f7f7f7; } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112,112,112,0.5); } .ds-btn-outline:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Single-line text field. Used in forms and quick capture.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid #ebebeb; background: transparent; color: #252525; font-size: 14px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; min-width: 0; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8e8e8e; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #b4b4b4; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(112,112,112,0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { background: rgba(247,247,247,0.5); opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; } .dark .ds-input { background: rgba(69,69,69,0.3); border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.15); color: #fafafa; } .dark .ds-input::placeholder { color: #b4b4b4; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Content container. Used for stats, plan items, and column cards.
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; border-radius: 14px; padding: 16px 0; background: #ffffff; color: #252525; font-size: 14px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(37,37,37,0.1); } .dark .ds-card { background: #343434; color: #fafafa; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,0.1); } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 16px; }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Link
components.description: Navigation item in the desktop sidebar.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; color: #252525; font-size: 14px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms ease; } .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #f7f7f7; } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; } .dark .ds-nav-link { color: #fafafa; } .dark .ds-nav-link:hover { background: #444444; }

components.name: Category Badge
components.description: Semantic category pill badge. Color varies by category.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(34,197,94,0.13); color: #22c55e; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #22c55e; flex-shrink: 0; }

narrative.overview: Arfa Content is a personal command center — a terminal for your content workflow. Every pixel serves the data. The system is intentionally flat, monochrome, and utilitarian: no decorative gradients, no shadows, no ornamental typography. Surfaces are distinguished by lightness shifts and hairlines rather than drop shadows or blurs.
keyCharacteristics: Utilitarian, content-first — chrome is the enemy
Flat surfaces, no shadows — depth from tonal layering and borders
System-native typography — no web fonts, instant rendering
Semantic color — every accent carries category data, never decorates for its own sake
Responsive shell — sidebar desk, bottom nav mobile, content takes the rest

rules.name: The Two-Color Document Rule
rules.body: The active interface uses exactly two colors at any moment: Ink and Paper. Category accents are the exceptions — they carry semantic data and are spatially contained to small badge/tag elements.

rules.name: The No-Fonts Rule
rules.body: Zero web fonts loaded. System stack only. The brand is the data, not the typeface.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Design Rule
rules.body: No element casts a shadow. Not on cards, not on buttons, not on modals. Surfaces are distinguished by lightness alone.

dos: Use Ink and Paper as the two active colors. Category accents only for badges and border markers.
Keep the interface flat. No shadows, no blurs, no glass effects.
Use system UI font stack. Zero font files loaded.
Use `ring-1` for card separation. One hairline is enough.
Use focus rings (3px, Ring color) for keyboard navigation.
Let responsive breakpoints be the only layout shift — sidebar on desktop, bottom nav on mobile.
donts: Use `border-left` greater than 1px as a colored accent on cards or list items. Use full background fills or pill badges instead.
Use gradient text, glassmorphism, or decorative blurs.
Add shadows on cards, buttons, modals, or tooltips.
Use skeleton loaders or shimmer animations.
Add numbered section markers (01 / 02 / 03) as decoration.
Use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
